data.name: IntegrationRow
params:
{
	name,
	description,
	icon,
	isConnected,
	connectedOrgName,
	isLoading,
	onManage,
}

data.name: InviteMemberDialog
params:
{
	open,
	onOpenChange,
	organizationId,
	organizationName,
	invitableRoles,
	currentUserRole,
}

edges.target:
q
				.from({ hosts: collections.v2Hosts })
				.where(({ hosts }) =>
					eq(hosts.organizationId, activeOrganizationId ?? ""),
				)
				.select

q
				.from({ hosts: collections.v2Hosts })
				.where(({ hosts }) =>
					eq(hosts.organizationId, activeOrganizationId ?? ""),
				)
				.select

q
				.from({ members: collections.members })
				.innerJoin({ users: collections.users }, ({ members, users }) =>
					eq(members.userId, users.id),
				)
				.select(({ members, users }) => ({
					...users,
					...members,
					memberId: members.id,
				}))
				.orderBy(({ members }) => members.role, "asc")
				.orderBy

q
				.from({ members: collections.members })
				.innerJoin({ users: collections.users }, ({ members, users }) =>
					eq(members.userId, users.id),
				)
				.select(({ members, users }) => ({
					...users,
					...members,
					memberId: members.id,
				}))
				.orderBy

q
				.from({ members: collections.members })
				.innerJoin({ users: collections.users }, ({ members, users }) =>
					eq(members.userId, users.id),
				)
				.select

q
				.from({ invitations: collections.invitations })
				.leftJoin({ users: collections.users }, ({ invitations, users }) =>
					eq(invitations.inviterId, users.id),
				)
				.select

				.select(({ members, users }) => ({

				)
				.select(({ members, users }) => ({

q
